# Liminal Sites

> Living website evolution engine from KyaniteLabs.

Homepage: https://kyanitelabs.github.io/liminal-sites/
Repository: https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/liminal-sites
Core engine: https://github.com/KyaniteLabs/liminal

Liminal Sites helps operators refresh real websites through AI-assisted visual directions, taste memory, before-and-after previews, runtime skin exports, rollback receipts, and repo-native patch planning. It specializes the Liminal creative engine for website profiles, design systems, brand constraints, live preview, and MCP-accessible operator workflows.

## Use cases
- AI-assisted website redesign
- Living website evolution after launch
- Runtime CSS/JS skin generation
- Design-system variation and comparison
- Repo-native website patch planning
- MCP tools for site operators and coding agents

## Key paths
- `README.md`: public overview and quick start
- `docs/index.html`: public landing page
- `docs/COLLABORATOR_QUICKSTART.md`: operator quickstart
- `docs/LIVING_SITES_VERTICAL_SLICES.md`: product slice inventory
- `src/sites/`: website profile, variant, skin, preference, and repo-patch logic
- `src/mcp/`: MCP server and site tools

## Keywords
Liminal Sites, AI website design agent, living website engine, generative web design, runtime skin generator, AI design-system patching, website evolution tool, MCP website tools, KyaniteLabs.
